title: P24 payment object
description: Information used to pay using P24(Przelewy24).

name.description: The name of the account holder associated with this payment method.

email.description: The email address of the account holder associated with this payment method.

method_id.description: Numeric identifier of the payment scheme or bank used for the payment.

method_description.description: Friendly name of the payment scheme or bank used for the payment.
